zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Braose於大約1197年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼時，他的父親Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose16歲，母親Grace de Briwere13歲。他於大約1220年與Lady Eve Abergavenny在威爾士布洛可爾布洛可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1230年5月2日在英國威爾斯尼德阿享年34歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Braose was born about 1197, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, his father, Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose, was 16 and his mother, Grace de Briwere, was 13. He married Lady Eve Abergavenny about 1220, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 2 May 1230, in Aber, Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Braose est né environ 1197, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Grace de Briwere, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Lady Eve Abergavenny environ 1220, à Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 2 mai 1230, à Aber, Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

Er hat um 1220 in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales Lady Eve Abergavenny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 2. ja.lifeSummary: William de Braoseが約1197年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーで生まれた時，父Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braoseは16歳，母Grace de Briwereは13歳であった。約1220年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロクでLady Eve Abergavennyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1230年5月2日にイギリスウェールズグウイネッドアバーで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Braose(이)가 대략 1197년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Grace de Briwere(은)는 13세였다. 그는 대략 1220년 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 Lady Eve Abergavenny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1230년 5월 2일 영국 웨일스 그윈드 압어에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Braose родился около 1197 г. в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Grace de Briwere, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Eve Abergavenny около 1220 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 2 мая 1230 г. в местности абир, гвинедд, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет.
